LanguageData.FCP_Thought_BoS_Rank_Earned.stages.0.des: My service to the Brotherhood has been recognized. The chain of command rewards those who follow it.
LanguageData.FCP_Thought_BoS_Research_Complete.stages: We've secured another piece of pre-war knowledge. The Brotherhood's mission continues.
I helped someone who needed it. This is what Elder Lyons taught us - power with purpose.
LanguageData.FCP_Thought_Outcast_Outsider_Failed.stag: As expected, an outsider proved unreliable. This is why the Brotherhood can only trust its own.
Another critical piece of technology has been recovered and catalogued. The mission above all else.
LanguageData.FCP_BoS_Turned_In_An_Outlaw.stages.0.des: We apprehended a suspect and they're now being taken to the BoS.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Turned_In_A_Slave.stages.0.de: This colony turned in a prisoner to the Legion. Everyone shall know of our might!
LanguageData.FCP_MedXWithdrawal.stages.1.description: I feel like my whole body is on fire. Every injury screams at me. I need Med-X!
LanguageData.FCP_MedXWithdrawal.stages.1.label: Med-X withdrawal
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_BuffoutWithdrawal.stages.1.de: I feel so weak. My muscles ache. I need Buffout!
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_DaddyOWithdrawal.stages.1.des: My mind feels foggy without Daddy-O.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_DayTripperWithdrawal.stages.1: I feel so dull without Day Tripper.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_JetWithdrawal.stages.1.descri: Everything feels so slow. I need another hit of Jet. Just one more!
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_JetWithdrawal.stages.1.label: Jet withdrawal
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_MentatsWithdrawal.stages.1.de: Can't think clearly. Everything's foggy. Need Mentats!
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_PsychoWithdrawal.stages.1.des: I feel weak and vulnerable. Need Psycho to feel strong again!
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_SlasherWithdrawal.stages.1.de: Feel useless in combat without Slasher. Need to feel that edge again!
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_UltrajetWithdrawal.stages.1.d: Everything feels wrong without Ultrajet. I need it!
LanguageData.FCP_Thought_Enclave_Mission_Success.stag: Another successful operation for the Enclave. We are one step closer to restoring America.
LanguageData.FCP_Thought_Enclave_Mutant_Eliminated.st: I eliminated another mutant aberration. The wasteland grows purer with each one removed.
LanguageData.FCP_Thought_Enclave_Outsider_Contact.sta: I had to interact with genetically inferior wastelanders. Necessary, but distasteful.
LanguageData.FCP_Thought_Enclave_Power_Armor_Equipped: This Enclave power armor represents the pinnacle of pre-war engineering. I am invincible.
LanguageData.FCP_Thought_Enclave_Rank_Earned.stages.0: My dedication to America has been recognized. I am climbing the ranks toward the restoration of civilization.
LanguageData.FCP_Thought_Enclave_Research_Complete.st: Another technological breakthrough for the Enclave. America's superiority is assured through science.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Quantum_Thought.stages.0.d: I feel like I can take on the world! This blue glow is amazing!
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Victory_Thought.stages.0.d: This premium cola makes me feel like a champion.
LanguageData.Nukashine_Thought.stages.0.description: Everything is wonderful! What was I doing again?
LanguageData.Nukashine_Thought.stages.0.label: nukashine bliss
LanguageData.FCP_PRC_Turned_In_A_Spy.stages.0.descrip: We exposed an enemy agent and they have been taken into custody by state security forces. The People's Republic is safer because of our vigilance.
LanguageData.FCP_PRC_Turned_In_A_Spy.stages.0.label: turned in a spy
LanguageData.FCP_Ate_Pre_War_Food.stages.0.descriptio: I ate some Pre-War food. Not too great, but better than raw food!
LanguageData.FCP_Ate_Pre_War_Food.stages.0.label: Ate Pre-War Food
LanguageData.FCP_NCR_Turned_In_An_Outlaw.stages.0.des: We apprehended a suspect and they're now being taken to the NCRCF.
LanguageData.FCP_Ate_Bug_Mush.stages.0.description: That was disgusting. Ground up insects... I can still feel them.
LanguageData.FCP_Ate_Bug_Mush.stages.0.label: ate bug mush
LanguageData.FCP_Ate_Comfort_Food.stages.0.descriptio: A warm, comforting meal. It reminds me of better times.
LanguageData.FCP_Ate_Comfort_Food.stages.0.label: ate comfort food
LanguageData.FCP_Ate_Flea_Soup.stages.0.description: That was barely food. Just murky water with bits floating in it.
LanguageData.FCP_Ate_Flea_Soup.stages.0.label: ate flea soup
An exceptional meal! The kind of food that makes life in the wasteland worth living.
A well-prepared meal from the wasteland. Actually quite tasty!
LanguageData.FCP_Ate_Tasty_Wasteland_Food.stages.0.de: That was delicious! Who knew wasteland food could taste so good?
LanguageData.FCP_Ate_Wasteland_Food.stages.0.descript: Simple wasteland cooking. It fills the belly.
LanguageData.FCP_Ate_Wasteland_Food.stages.0.label: ate wasteland food
